title: Cup for Gitea
subtitle: Native Gitea client for iOS
txt_1: This app does not collect any data for itself. All collected data is managed by the Gitea instance you configured yourself.
txt_2: To learn more about the terms of use and privacy policy you accepted during registration, check the website or contact your instance administrator.
txt_4: When the feedback form is used in the app or on the web, the IP address and user agent are stored in log files for 30 days.
txt_5: The feedback content (optional email address and free text) is stored until the request has been processed or is no longer relevant.
read_legal: I have read and accept the privacy information
